title: Domain 1: Fundamentals of AI and ML (20%)
description: The core vocabulary and mental model: how AI, ML, deep learning, and generative AI relate, the main types of ML, and the machine-learning lifecycle.

lessons.title: AI, ML, Deep Learning, and Generative AI
objectives: Explain how AI, machine learning, deep learning, and generative AI nest inside each other
Define a model, training, and inference in plain terms

lessons.title: Types of Machine Learning
objectives: Distinguish supervised, unsupervised, and reinforcement learning
Tell classification from regression, and both from clustering
Match a learning type to a business problem and its data

lessons.title: The ML Lifecycle and Where AWS Fits
objectives: Put the stages of the ML lifecycle in order
Explain why data quality drives model quality
Decide when to use a pre-built AI service versus building with SageMaker
